summary: Complete frontend testing of 'nearest golf course + distance' feature for Hotels, Restaurants, Cafes & Bars, and Beach Clubs. All 12 test scenarios passed successfully. The distance data is correctly displayed on card fronts with 'Xkm to [Course Name]' format, on card backs with 'Xkm from [Course Name]' format, and in QuickView modals as pill badges.

hotels_section.card_front_format: PASS - 'Xkm to [Golf Course Name]' with Navigation icon

restaurants_section.card_front_format: PASS - 'Xkm to [Golf Course Name]' with Navigation icon

cafes_bars_section.card_front_format: PASS - 'Xkm to [Golf Course Name]' with Navigation icon

beach_clubs_section.card_count: 12 beach clubs (11 with badges - existing feature)

quickview_modals.hotel_modal: PASS - Shows '2km to Real Golf De Bendinat' as pill badge
quickview_modals.restaurant_modal: PASS - Shows '3km to Capdepera Golf' as pill badge
quickview_modals.cafe_bar_modal: PASS - Shows '5km to Son Vida Golf' as pill badge
quickview_modals.beach_club_modal: PASS - Shows '3.2km to Real Golf de Bendinat' as pill badge

golf_courses_section.no_distance_badges: PASS - Golf course cards correctly do NOT show distance badges

passed_tests: Hotel cards show 'Xkm to [Golf Course Name]' with Navigation icon on card front
Restaurant cards show 'Xkm to [Golf Course Name]' with Navigation icon on card front
Cafe/Bar cards show 'Xkm to [Golf Course Name]' with Navigation icon on card front
Beach Club cards show existing distance badges correctly
Hotel card back (flip side) shows 'Xkm from [Golf Course Name]'
Restaurant card back (flip side) shows 'Xkm from [Golf Course Name]'
Cafe/Bar card back (flip side) shows 'Xkm from [Golf Course Name]'
QuickView modal for hotels shows distance badge
QuickView modal for restaurants shows distance badge
QuickView modal for cafes/bars shows distance badge
QuickView modal for beach clubs shows distance badge
Golf course cards correctly display without distance badges
critical_code_review_comments: HotelPartners.jsx correctly implements nearest_golf display on both card front and card back
RestaurantPartners.jsx correctly implements nearest_golf display on both card front and card back
CafeBarsPartners.jsx correctly implements nearest_golf display on both card front and card back
QuickViewModal.jsx correctly shows nearest_golf badges for hotel, restaurant, cafe_bar, and beach_club types
All data-testid attributes are properly implemented for testing (hotel-nearest-golf-{id}, restaurant-nearest-golf-{id}, cafe-nearest-golf-{id})
Navigation icon from lucide-react is used consistently across all components
context_for_next_testing_agent: Nearest golf course + distance feature fully implemented and tested across Hotels (38), Restaurants (49), Cafes/Bars (36), and Beach Clubs (12). All card fronts show 'Xkm to [Course Name]', all card backs show 'Xkm from [Course Name]', and all QuickView modals display distance badges. Golf course cards correctly do NOT show distance badges. MongoDB migration script has populated all venue documents with nearest_golf and distance_km fields.
